0.text: Minimal fibrotic changes in the lungs

1.text: Mild irregularly circumscribed nonspecific nodular densities adjacent to the minor fissure in the middle lobe of the right lung

2.text: Nodular density with a subpleural diameter of 5 mm in the posterobasal region of the left lower lobe

3.text: Several additional nodules, largest measuring 3 mm in the posterobasal right lower lobe
